intendedPlayerFacingMeaning: Try the smallest live-authority semantic composition: improve the opener, reduce measured lower-field overstay, and explicitly protect groups 4 and 5.
invariantsPreserved: active score windows do not regress
center-lane bias remains below the trial floor
group 4 aggregate score stays at or above baseline
group 4 and group 5 baseline geometry is preserved
group 4 and group 5 cannot be allowed to regress
group 5 aggregate score stays at or above baseline
late boss-led cleanup does not become the casualty of group 1 tuning
multi-target lane share does not regress
path family remains canonical for touched groups
scoreable route baseline is preserved unless a later measured route probe says otherwise
expectedMetricMovement: Potential total object-track lift through group 1 while preserving late group floors and guardrails.

compilerMapping.sourceReadyStatus: analysis-only until browser proof verifies object-track path-length transfer
analysis-only until browser proof verifies lower-field transfer

group1PathLengthCompression.semanticMeaning: Compress group 1 aggregate path length toward the RED target while preserving the live cross-sweep family.
group1PathLengthCompression.expectedVisibleEffect: Speeds reference-path playback and may shorten sampled visible-route length, but the path-length transfer function is not proven for Stage 7.
group1PathLengthCompression.proofHarnessRequired: future Stage 7 path-length expressibility proof plus challenge-motion-profile and strict challenge-stage conformance

lowerFieldOverstayReduction.semanticMeaning: Reduce lower-field overstay by translating target lower-field share into runtime lower-field bias controls.
lowerFieldOverstayReduction.expectedVisibleEffect: Moves the affected group vertically and changes late lower-field dwell, but the lowerFieldShare transfer function is not proven for Stage 7.
lowerFieldOverstayReduction.proofHarnessRequired: future Stage 7 lower-field expressibility proof plus challenge-motion-profile and strict challenge-stage conformance

whyMoreLikelyThanBlindTuning: The composition encodes the rejected-candidate lesson: group 1 can move only if groups 4 and 5 stay protected and all source-ready family labels remain live-authority compatible.
